zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Chandos於大約1350年出生在英國賀福爾斯諾德爾時，她的父親John de Cormeilles41歲，母親Isabell36歲。她和Thomas de Berkeley至少有1個女兒。她去世於1406年4月4日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東享年57歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾可利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Chandos于大约1350年出生在英国賀福爾斯諾德爾时，她的父亲John de Cormeilles41岁，母亲Isabell36岁。她和Thomas de Berkeley至少有1个女儿。她去世于1406年4月4日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾貝福斯東享年57岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾可利。

nameMeanings.name: Chandos
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Candos in Illeville-sur-Montfort (Eure).

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Chandos was born about 1350, in Snodhill, Herefordshire, England, her father, John de Cormeilles, was 41 and her mother, Isabell, was 36. She had at least 1 daughter with Thomas de Berkeley. She died on 4 April 1406, in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57, and was buried in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Chandos est née environ 1350, à Snodhill, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, John de Cormeilles, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Isabell, avait 36 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Thomas de Berkeley. Elle est décédée le 4 avril 1406, à Beverston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Coberley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Chandos um 1350 in Snodhill, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John de Cormeilles 41 und ihre Mutter Isabell 36. Sie hatte mit Thomas de Berkeley mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 4. April 1406 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Beverston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Coberley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Chandos è nata il circa 1350 nel Snodhill, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, John de Cormeilles, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Isabell, aveva 36 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Thomas de Berkeley. Morì il 4 aprile 1406, nel Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Chandosが約1350年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアスノドヒルで生まれた時，父John de Cormeillesは41歳，母Isabellは36歳であった。彼女はThomas de Berkeleyとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1406年4月4日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアベバーストンで57歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアコバーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Chandos(이)가 대략 1350년 영국 허퍼드실르 스노딜에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John de Cormeilles(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabell(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 Thomas de Berkeley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1406년 4월 4일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 비버스턴에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 컵를리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Chandos nasceu aproximadamente 1350, em Snodhill, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Cormeilles, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Isabell, tinha 36 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Thomas de Berkeley. Ela faleceu em 4 de abril de 1406, em Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Chandos родилась около 1350 г. в местности снодхилл, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John de Cormeilles было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Isabell, 36. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Thomas de Berkeley. Она умерла 4 апреля 1406 г. в местности бивирстон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности кобирли, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Chandos nació aproximadamente 1350, en Snodhill, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Cormeilles, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Isabell, tenía 36 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Thomas de Berkeley. Murió el 4 de abril de 1406, en Beverston, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Coberley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
